test.details: 88 tests passed across 5 files (shared/job-matching, shared/extension-api, extension/check page, check route, mark-applied route). Extension tests: 16 passed with 3 unhandled rejection warnings from timeout test AbortController timing.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Initial commit accidentally committed extension/node_modules/ and extension/dist/ to git (35 files, ~4300 lines). Follow-up commit added .gitignore and removed them. Git history is bloated but functionally correct.
AuthError.status typed as '401 | 403' but only instantiated with 401 — creates dead code path in popup.ts where `err instanceof AuthError && err.status === 403` can never be true.
Dead code: `err instanceof AuthError && err.status === 403` condition in popup.ts error handling since 403 uses ForbiddenError, not AuthError.
UI can flash between cached and fresh state without transition when background re-check returns different status. Functional per spec but may be jarring UX.
No test coverage for malformed JSON response .catch() fallback paths in handleResponse.
dangerouslyIgnoreUnhandledErrors: true in extension vitest config suppresses all unhandled rejections, could mask future test bugs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to extension-worker skill procedure: create extension/.gitignore (with node_modules/ and dist/) as one of the first steps before running npm install or building, to prevent accidental commits of build artifacts and dependencies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: extension-scaffold worker committed 35 files of node_modules and dist before adding .gitignore in a follow-up commit. Worker's own feedback confirmed this gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to extension-worker skill procedure: when the extension has its own vitest config, ensure the root vitest.config.ts excludes extension/ test files to prevent root `npm test` from picking up extension tests that depend on extension-specific mocks/config.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: extension-popup-and-client worker discovered this need independently. Root vitest.config.ts now excludes extension/** at line 4. Worker's feedback confirmed this should be documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document in extension-worker skill that AbortController + fake timers interaction in vitest may require dangerouslyIgnoreUnhandledErrors: true in extension vitest config, with a note about the trade-off (suppresses all unhandled rejections).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: extension-popup-and-client worker needed this for timeout tests. extension/vitest.config.ts has explanatory comment. 3 PromiseRejectionHandledWarning messages still appear in test output.
